pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile or recognize JDK 21 language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-war-plugin may fail to run or package correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.
